title: SQL: INSERT INTO + ORDER BY
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_table (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, value TEXT, created_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
INSERT INTO test_table (id, value) VALUES (3, NULL);
INSERT INTO test_table (id, value) SELECT id, value FROM test_table ORDER BY id DESC;
key_bug_features: INSERT INTO with ORDER BY causes unexpected behavior
